GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "This homegrown brand has the perfect holiday gift for everyone in your life", "It's beginning to smell a lot like Christmas.", "Since its arrival on the scene in 2006, Australia's Glasshouse Fragrances have been creating award-winning scents that have made them a firm favourite, both here and around the globe. Their signature scented candles quickly gained cult status, with fans knowing the much-loved fragrances, inspired by exotic locations including Tahaa, Montego Bay, Marseille and the Amalfi Coast, by name as well as by smell. Adored for their premium workmanship, each of Glasshouse Fragrances candles are hand-wicked, trimmed, poured and polished in the brand's hometown of Sydney. Glasshouse Fragrance's eagerly anticipated Christmas collections are a limited line of seasonal scents, complete with covetable sets and festive packaging. With fragrances and shades to get any home in a more festive state of mind, this year's editions are no exception. Since fragrance is the perfect kind of present to suit everyone, from your bestie to your holiday host, we're breaking down exactly who should get what. For your ride-or-die: Glasshouse Fragrances Night Before Christmas 380g Soy Candle. While the collection is limited, this much-beloved scent is an annual tradition. It's fresh and zingy (care of blackcurrant, plum and lemon) but there's a delicate touch of nostalgia to it too (rose, musk and lavender) that she'll appreciate. In a pretty red (glass) dress for the holidays, it's just as at home among a family gathering as a slightly wilder dinner with the girls. For him: Glasshouse Fragrances Under the Mistletoe 380g Soy Candle. Cinnamon and clove make it spicy (like him), while vanilla and caramel make it sweet (also like him). And if he doesn't pick up on the flirty nod in the name of this sweet, warm scent, then he doesn't deserve you. For your northern hemisphere expats: Glasshouse Fragrances White Christmas 380g Soy Candle. Our Christmas holidays might all be prawns and pavlova, but for much of the world, the scent of December is one steeped in cedar, balsam and snow. For your mate displaced much further north, this scent will remind them of nights by the fire while a snowman sits in the front yard. For mum: Glasshouse Fragrances A Tahaa Affair Spinning Carousel. Inspired by traditional European ornaments, she'll appreciate the fine details in this delicate and dreamy creation. The warmth from the lit wick spins the tiny baubles, casting a dainty shadow and emitting a sweet pineapple and coconut scent as it goes. Buy it for mum, but don't be surprised if you come back for a second one for you. For every holiday party host: Glasshouse Fragrances Merry & Bright 380g Soy Candle. As far as crowd-pleasers go, this clever and sophisticated scent combination (featuring zesty notes like pineapple, strawberry and mint) is it. A perfect partner to any holiday soiree, hand it to the host as you walk through the door, then encourage them to light it immediately. This vibrant candle is so bright and fresh, it practically fizzes, so accompany it with a toast using something effervescent and French. For your indecisive sister: Glasshouse Fragrances Signature Scents Eau de Parfum Set. For when you can't choose a favourite scent, this limited edition set boasts three. Complete with a too-pretty-to-hide-away atomiser and three different fragrances, she will be spoilt for choice. Wear one in the morning, another at lunchtime and a third for evening, or let her combine them however she likes to make a unique scent all of her own."
